text.message: I am going 3411 i think, but i can leave you space somewhere
so if you want 6312 i wont point right
why would u go 6 3 12 instead of 8 4
u want to ddouble all ur numbers?
roll wheat and ore at the same time
not good long term to have all the same numbers
i mean if his 6 ore doesnt roll much, what good does a 8 wheat do
Yea but just because I said I didn’t want to plow him
when u have cities u dont want too many cards at the same time
Blk can u trade me a brick when possible for no plow
as long as 6s arent too hot yes
there is your 2 brick trades red
cause i gave him my extra brick
i cant just give you unlimited road settles
how do u roll all the 7s
give a guy with 11 cards a trade?
Dude. You needed to take road
red has been on his knees since the beginning
